name: PR Scan - Invalid PR URL shows validation error
description: After mock login, submit a malformed or non-GitHub URL to the PR Scan form and verify the app shows a helpful validation error instead of crashing.

planSteps.description: The PR Scan form is visible with a URL input field
In the PR URL input field, type: https://example.com/not-a-real-pr
Click the Scan or Analyze button
The app shows an error message or validation warning — it does not crash, show a blank screen, or display a Trust Score for an invalid URL
